sqlMap.select: select * from SurchargeTax where CoverageSequence = #CoverageSequence# and TransactionSequence = #TransactionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and SurchargeTaxTypeKey = #SurchargeTaxTypeKey#
sqlMap.insert: insert into SurchargeTax(SurchargeTaxSequence, CoverageSequence, TransactionSequence, PolicyKey Amount LastUpdateUserID LastUpdateTimeStamp SurchargeTaxTypeKey ) values (#SurchargeTaxSequence:NUMERIC#, #CoverageSequence:NUMERIC#, #TransactionSequence:NUMERIC#, #PolicyKey:NUMERIC# #Amount# #LastUpdateUserID# #LastUpdateTimeStamp# #SurchargeTaxTypeKey# )
sqlMap.select: select SurchargeTaxSequence, Amount, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, CoverageSequence, TransactionSequence, PolicyKey, SurchargeTaxTypeKey from SurchargeTax where SurchargeTaxSequence = #SurchargeTaxSequence# and CoverageSequence = #CoverageSequence# and TransactionSequence = #TransactionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.update:
update SurchargeTax set
Amount = #Amount# Amount = null LastUpdateUserID = #LastUpdateUserID# LastUpdateUserID = null LastUpdateTimeStamp = #LastUpdateTimeStamp# LastUpdateTimeStamp = null SurchargeTaxTypeKey = #SurchargeTaxTypeKey# SurchargeTaxTypeKey = null
where SurchargeTaxSequence = #SurchargeTaxSequence# and CoverageSequence = #CoverageSequence# and TransactionSequence = #TransactionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.delete: delete from SurchargeTax where SurchargeTaxSequence = #SurchargeTaxSequence# and CoverageSequence = #CoverageSequence# and TransactionSequence = #TransactionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
delete from SurchargeTax where CoverageSequence = #CoverageSequence# and TransactionSequence = #TransactionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and SurchargeTaxTypeKey = #SurchargeTaxTypeKey#
sqlMap.select: select SurchargeTaxSequence, Amount, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, CoverageSequence, TransactionSequence, PolicyKey, SurchargeTaxTypeKey from SurchargeTax where SurchargeTaxSequence = #SurchargeTaxSequence# and CoverageSequence = #CoverageSequence# and TransactionSequence = #TransactionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#

select SurchargeTaxSequence, CoverageSequence, TransactionSequence, PolicyKey, Amount, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp from SurchargeTax where CoverageSequence = #CoverageSequence# and TransactionSequence = #TransactionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and SurchargeTaxTypeKey = #SurchargeTaxTypeKey#
